title: Property and capital gains tax
description: How CGT affects real estate, including rental properties, land, improvements and your home.
keywords: Capital gains tax real estate, CGT property, CGT properties. CGT land

child_links.description: Find out if your home is exempt from CGT, and what happens if you rent it out.

child_links.title: CGT discount for affordable housing
